Notice Of Defendant In Intervention Alano Insurance Company'S Motion To Intervene On Behalf Of Defendants Cashmere Ikechi Obinna And Usa Cab, Llc
Off Calendar Jul-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - OTHER ALANO INSURANCE COMPANY ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANTS CASHMERE IKECHI OBINNA AND USA CAB, LLC'S Notice Of Defendant In Intervention Alano Insurance Company'S Motion To Intervene On Behalf Of Defendants Cashmere Ikechi Obinna And Usa Cab, Llc.

Alano Insurance Company's unopposed Motion to Intervene is GRANTED IN SUBSTANTIAL PART.

Good cause appearing, the court grants Alano Insurance Company leave to intervene as a defendant in this action. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 387(d)(1)(B).) Alano Insurance Company shall file its answer in intervention forthwith, but no later than 20 days after entry of this order. Alano Insurance Company should present this order at the time it submits its answer in intervention for filing.

Alano Insurance Company must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org no later than 8:30 am on 7/31/2025 a proposed order quoting the above text verbatim.
